question.question_text: What will the NZD/USD exchange rate be on 2026-03-27 (or the next available trading day)?

prediction.reasoning: The point estimate assumes the rate will remain stable on the next trading day. The confidence intervals are calculated based on an estimated typical daily volatility for NZD/USD, approximating a 0.6% daily move around the current rate, using standard normal distribution z-scores for each confidence level.
